# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness/robustness issues were identified in this diff. The patch only updates run artifacts (`.ralph-burning/projects/5xn-1/run.json:16-40`, `.ralph-burning/projects/5xn-1/journal.ndjson:6-9`) and does not change implementation logic. The relevant Claude effort support paths already exist and are correct (`src/adapters/process_backend.rs:814-841`, `src/adapters/process_backend.rs:1332-1343`) with the default final-review Claude reviewer model including `-max` in defaults (`src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs:1558-1560`).

## Amendments

None.
